channel.title: ShovelsSale Dispatch
channel.description: The analytical publication layer of ShovelsSale.com — structured releases on classification, infrastructure, dependency, and control.

item.title: Why NVIDIA Is a Shovel Layer Asset | Dispatch 001
item.description: Dispatch 001 from ShovelsSale.com: a scanner-based structural classification explaining why NVIDIA behaves as a shovel layer asset in the AI market structure rather than merely a visible winner.

item.title: Dispatch 002 — ASML and the Infrastructure of Irreplaceability
item.description: ASML does not build chips. It controls the machines that make them. This Dispatch analyzes ASML through the Shovel Scanner and defines its position in the Control Layer of the AI economy.
